name: chokepoint-renamed-rmm-emulation
description: Copy notepad.exe to campaign name, execute, outbound TCP. Expected: EID 1 (metadata mismatch), EID 11 (file in Downloads), EID 3 (outbound).

detectionQueries.name: Renamed Executable Creation
detectionQueries.query: DeviceFileEvents | where Timestamp > ago(1h) | where FolderPath has 'Downloads' | where FileName endswith '.exe' | project Timestamp, DeviceName, FileName, InitiatingProcessFileName

detectionQueries.name: Metadata Mismatch Detection
detectionQueries.query: DeviceProcessEvents | where Timestamp > ago(1h) | where FileName endswith '.exe' | where InitiatingProcessFileName != FileName | project Timestamp, DeviceName, FileName, InitiatingProcessFileName, ProcessCommandLine

detectionQueries.name: Outbound TCP Connections
detectionQueries.query: DeviceNetworkEvents | where Timestamp > ago(1h) | where RemotePort in (443, 8443, 3389) | where InitiatingProcessFileName endswith '.exe' | project Timestamp, DeviceName, RemoteIP, RemotePort, InitiatingProcessFileName
